title: TFC Stackable Piles
description: TFC Addon allowing stacking more than 1 item on the ground with [V]
body:
Allows you to place [V] up to a stack of items on the ground.

The controls work like Log Piles: The first time you place something, one item gets placed, a second click inserts the whole stack.

You retrieve one item at a time like in TFC Base, but if you Shift + Right Click you get the whole stack back.

 
Pit Kilns and Firebox Kilns will drop all but 1 items before you attempt to fill a hole with straw/when the Firebox would bake them.
